basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.post_name: Project Post-Doctoral Fellow – Energy Systems Modelling
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur) Project Post Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website IIT Kanpur. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering/ Energy/ Power Systems with excellent grades (>7.0 CGPA or 70%) in the Bachelor's &/or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering /Energy Engineering/or an equivalent academic degree. Hands-on experience with MATLAB and/or Python programming.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Post-Doctoral Fellow – Energy Systems Modelling

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for Selection Process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Post-Doctoral Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering, Energy, or Power Systems, with strong academic records and proficiency in MATLAB and/or Python programming.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Post-Doctoral Fellow – Energy Systems Modelling position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 85,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is contractual, offering a fixed-term engagement for the project duration.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P.Rect./R&D/2026/98.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Master's degree apply?
faq.answer: The primary qualification is a Ph.D. However, the summary mentions excellent grades in Bachelor's and/or Master's degrees as part of the overall academic requirement.
